daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today, Pisces. The cosmic vibes are whispering secrets only you can hear. Trust that quiet knowing inside—it's your superpower showing up exactly when you need it.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting toward you in ways that feel soft and genuine. Whether it's deepening a connection or attracting new people, your authenticity is magnetic right now. Let them see the real you.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have serious potential today. Don't dim your light thinking you're being too much—that's exactly the energy your projects need. Speak up and watch how people respond to your vision.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentle movement and real rest. Skip the hustle mentality and give yourself permission to recharge. Hydrate, stretch, breathe—these aren't boring, they're revolution.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
